title.en: OTP API Documentation - REST API to Send & Verify OTPs

description.en: Complete REST API documentation for sending OTPs and checking status. Code examples in cURL, Node.js, Python, PHP, Java, and Go. Simple JSON API with idempotent sends.

subtitle.en: A simple REST API to send OTPs via SMS and check delivery status. One endpoint to send, one to check status. Works with any language or framework.

body.en:
Authentication

All API requests require an API key in the X-API-Key header. Create API keys from your dashboard.

X-API-Key: sm_live_your_api_key_here

Base URL

https://api.startmessaging.com

description.en: Send a one-time password to a phone number. Fields: phoneNumber (E.164 format), templateId (optional), and variables (Must contain "otp" — a 4-6 digit code you generate, plus optional custom placeholders like "appName").
Fetch the real-time delivery status of an OTP request. Statuses include: initiated, queued, sent, delivered, and failed.

badge.en: Send an OTP in One API Call

heading.en: Works with every language. Just a single POST request.

body.en:
Response Format

All responses follow a consistent JSON envelope:

{
  "success": true,
  "statusCode": 201,
  "requestId": "req_abc123",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-15T10:30:00.000Z",
  "data": {
    "otpRequestId": "uuid-of-otp-request",
    "messageId": "uuid-of-message",
    "status": "queued"
  }
}

question.en: What authentication does the API use?

answer.en: All requests require an API key passed in the X-API-Key header. API keys start with sm_live_ and can be created from the dashboard.

question.en: What format should phone numbers be in?

answer.en: Phone numbers must be in E.164 format: +{country code}{number}. For Indian numbers: +919876543210.
We support a high throughput of 20 OTPs per second globally per account. Additionally, there is a security limit of 3 OTPs per 5 minutes per mobile number to prevent abuse.

question.en: Do you support webhooks for delivery status?

answer.en: Delivery status is available via the messages API endpoint. You can poll for status updates using the message ID returned from the send endpoint.

heading.en: Start Building with the OTP API

subtext.en: Get your API key and send your first OTP in under 5 minutes.
